summary_lines: Do not claim a CHANGES branch proof from this run.

summary: A second live three-node helper slice is now recorded: targeted CHANGES was absent, but a broader later-workflow check recovered a REPORTS plus home.php window that clearly sits beyond top-level GUI down.
